scripts.dev: npm --workspace @allen/engine run build && npm --workspace @allen/ui run build && npm --workspace @allen/server run build && npm --workspace @allen/desktop run build && electron ./dist/main.js
scripts.package:prepare: npm --workspace @allen/engine run build && npm --workspace @allen/server run build && npm --workspace @allen/ui run build && npm --workspace @allen/desktop run build
scripts.dist:mac: npm run package:prepare && npm run preseed:mongo && cd ../.. && electron-builder --projectDir . --config packages/desktop/electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.dist:mac:unsigned: npm run package:prepare && npm run preseed:mongo && cd ../.. && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --projectDir . --config packages/desktop/electron-builder.yml --mac
